name: Winston (Versatile Node.js Logger)

performance.notes: Slower than Pino but still fast enough for most applications; format pipeline overhead

agent_readiness.notes: Most popular Node.js logging library. Multi-transport: Console, File, HTTP, Stream, with many community transports (winston-elasticsearch, winston-sentry, winston-daily-rotate-file). Custom formatters: JSON, simple, colorize, timestamp, printf. Multiple log levels. Exception and rejection handling. Profiling via profile(). Large ecosystem. TypeScript types. More flexible formatting than Pino but slower. Default choice for many Express.js applications.

gotchas: Slower than Pino for high-throughput applications
v3 API changed significantly from v2
best_when: Applications needing flexible log formatting and multiple transports
Teams needing extensive transport ecosystem (Sentry, ELK, Papertrail)
When custom log format beyond JSON is required
summary: Winston is the most popular Node.js logging library with multi-transport support (Console, File, HTTP, community transports for ELK, Sentry, etc.) and flexible custom formatters. TypeScript types. Exception and rejection handling built-in. More flexible than Pino but slower. Default choice for Express.js applications. Large ecosystem with community transports covering most logging destinations.
